overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along a mountain trail through a valley with red wildflowers and rocky terrain. A horse rider passes by midway through the clip. The environment features high-quality rendered graphics with natural lighting and distant mountain vistas.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail between rocky slope and flower meadow

events.description: flock of birds flies overhead in the clear sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the mountain valley, flanked by rocky terrain and wildflowers

entered.detail: steep rocky hillside with sparse grass covering the left side of the trail
field of red poppy flowers and tall grass on the right side of the path
large gray mountain peaks with rocky outcrops in the distance
narrow dirt trail winding through the valley floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow mountain trail bordered by a steep rocky slope on the left and a vibrant meadow of red poppies on the right. The path leads toward distant gray mountain peaks under a clear blue sky. Birds fly overhead as the character maintains a steady walking pace through the enclosed valley.

events.description: horse rider approaches from behind and overtakes on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horse rider passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: white horse with rider trotting past the character on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: A horse rider overtakes the character from behind, moving along the right side of the trail. The rider continues ahead along the dirt path through the valley, gradually moving into the distance. The surrounding terrain remains consistent with the rocky slope and flower meadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley trail with scattered boulders

events.description: path widens and left rocky slope recedes into the distance, revealing more of the open valley

agents.ego_description: walking through the wider valley with mountains ahead, passing large boulders on the right

entered.detail: large gray rock formation beside the trail on the right side
dense pine forest covering the distant left hillside

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wider valley as the left rocky slope recedes into the distance. A large boulder appears on the right side of the path, and a distant forest becomes visible on the left horizon. The character continues walking toward the mountain peaks ahead through the expansive natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a narrow, enclosed valley into an expansive open landscape. It begins with the character walking between a steep rocky slope and a vibrant meadow of red poppies, moving steadily toward distant gray peaks under a clear blue sky. As the journey continues, a horse rider overtakes the character from behind and recedes into the distance along the dirt path. The scene then opens up as the rocky slope on the left recedes, revealing a wider valley marked by a large boulder on the right and a distant forest appearing on the horizon. Finally, the camera maintains its forward momentum, following the character as they venture deeper into the vast natural terrain toward the looming mountains.
